brief_justification: Identifies all 3 correct inconsistencies matching ground truth; goes one level deep by explaining why each claim contradicts the DevOps description but doesn't explore compounding effects; proceeds linearly with no reflection on own reasoning process or bias checks; never tests boundary conditions or considers whether count could be 2 or 4; hedges slightly on #2 ('impractical', 'unlikely') but no structured confidence levels or acknowledgment of assumptions; considers no alternative interpretations (e.g., parallel pipelines could enable multiple daily deploys); every conclusion maps directly to explicit quotes from both parties, fully reproducible
